538.reason: [Infinite loop when '}' is missing; should check wordPoint bounds and handle missing '}' error]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Infinite loop when '}' is missing; should check wordPoint bounds and handle missing '}' error]

1025.reason: Should be "&" instead of "&&" to correctly represent the single '&' character

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Should be "&" instead of "&&" to correctly represent the single '&' character
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When a single '&' appears, the token value should be "&", not "&&". Adding the doubled operator misrepresents the input and may cause parsing errors.]

1034.reason: Should be "|" instead of "||" to correctly represent the single '|' character

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Should be "|" instead of "||" to correctly represent the single '|' character
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Same issue for single '|'; should not add a word with the doubled operator.]

376.reason: The loop condition does not check for end of input or invalid tokens, leading to an infinite loop or IndexOutOfBoundsException when ')' is missing. It blindly calls FuncRParams which may consume unrelated tokens or fail to advance, causing the parser to crash or hang instead of reporting the error and synchronizing.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The loop condition does not check for end of input or invalid tokens, leading to an infinite loop or IndexOutOfBoundsException when ')' is missing. It blindly calls FuncRParams which may consume unrelated tokens or fail to advance, causing the parser to crash or hang instead of reporting the error and synchronizing.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  If RPARENT is missing, this loop may run indefinitely or cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when wordPoint exceeds list size, as FuncRParams does not guarantee consuming tokens that lead to RPARENT or EOF in error cases.

371.reason: Accessing wordPoint + 1 without checking bounds can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException if IDENFR is the last token.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Accessing wordPoint + 1 without checking bounds can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException if IDENFR is the last token.

378.reason: [This loop assumes RPARENT will eventually be found, but if it's missing, it may cause infinite loop or IndexOutOfBoundsException instead of proper error handling]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This loop assumes RPARENT will eventually be found, but if it's missing, it may cause infinite loop or IndexOutOfBoundsException instead of proper error handling]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This loop will run indefinitely or cause an index out of bounds when there's no closing parenthesis, because it never advances past tokens that aren't RPARENT and doesn't check for end of input]
